title: Housing search
subtitle: Talk about looking for an apartment.
overview: Housing Spanish needs price, location, size, and condition.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I am looking for a small apartment.

items.es: Busco un apartamento cerca del trabajo.
items.en: I am looking for an apartment near work.

items.es: El apartamento tiene cocina y baño privado.
items.en: The apartment has a kitchen and private bathroom.

items.es: El alquiler es un poco caro para mí.
items.en: The rent is a little expensive for me.
I would like to visit it this week.
